nasb.text: And David assembled all Israel at Jerusalem to bring up the ark of the Lord to its place which he had prepared for it.

esv.text: And David assembled all Israel at Jerusalem to bring up the ark of the Lord  to its place, which he had prepared for it.

cnv.text: 於是，大衛把以色列人都招聚到耶路撒冷，要把耶和華的約櫃抬上來，到大衛給它預備好的地方去。

ccb.text: 大卫召集以色列人到耶路撒冷，要把耶和华的约柜抬到他所预备的地方。
